ddls:
CREATE TABLE "allele_peptide_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "allele_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HLA allele */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide sequence */,
  "measurement_value" INTEGER /* Measurement value indicating binding affinity */,
  "measurement_inequality" TEXT /* Inequality symbol (<, >, =) for comparison */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (qualitative, quantitative) */,
  "measurement_kind" TEXT /* Kind of measurement (e.g., mass_spec) */,
  "measurement_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement source */,
  "original_allele_id" INTEGER /* Original allele ID if different from the one listed */,
  "fold_0" INTEGER /* Fold 0 condition result */,
  "fold_1" INTEGER /* Fold 1 condition result */,
  "fold_2" INTEGER /* Fold 2 condition result */,
  "fold_3" INTEGER /* Fold 3 condition result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date of the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the experiment */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab where the experiment was conducted */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experimental condition */,
  "reliability_score" INTEGER /* Reliability score of the measurement */,
  "quality_control_passed" INTEGER /* Whether the measurement passed quality control */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allele_peptide_measurements_peptide_id FOREIGN KEY ("peptide_id") REFERENCES peptides ("peptide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allele_peptide_measurements_original_allele_id FOREIGN KEY ("original_allele_id") REFERENCES alleles ("allele_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allele_peptide_measurements_measurement_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_source_id") REFERENCES measurement_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_allele_peptide_measurements_allele_id FOREIGN KEY ("allele_id") REFERENCES alleles ("allele_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alleles" (
  "allele_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allele */,
  "allele_name" TEXT /* Name of the HLA allele */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the allele */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the HLA allele (e.g., Class I, Class II) */,
  "isotype" TEXT /* Isotype of the allele */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the allele */,
  "binding_site" TEXT /* Binding site of the allele */,
  "references" TEXT /* List of publications or references related to the allele */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allele_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peptides" (
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peptide */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the peptide */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the peptide */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the peptide */,
  "molecular_weight" INTEGER /* Molecular weight of the peptide */,
  "is_cyclic" INTEGER /* Whether the peptide is cyclic */,
  "chemical_formula" TEXT /* Chemical formula of the peptide */,
  "references" TEXT /* List of publications or references related to the peptide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference to the publication or data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., publication, internal data, external database) */,
  "source_year" INTEGER /* Year of the source */,
  "source_authors" TEXT /* Authors of the source */,
  "source_institution" TEXT /* Institution associated with the source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to access the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
column_names: Original allele ID if different from the one listed
ID of the researcher who performed the experiment
ID of the lab where the experiment was conducted
Whether the measurement passed quality control
Additional notes or comments about the measurement
Class of the HLA allele (e.g., Class I, Class II)
Amino acid sequence of the allele
List of publications or references related to the allele
List of publications or references related to the peptide
Unique identifier for each measurement source
Reference to the publication or data source
Type of source (e.g., publication, internal data, external database)
